block_00: Business and Trading. What’s in Common?
block_01: Turns out, business and trading have a lot in common. You, therefore, can learn how to trade better from successful businessmen. When you treat trading as your business, not only will you better understand its financial aspects but also learn how to set and achieve new goals.
block_02: Poor planning, inefficient management and a lack of focus can all negatively affect your results. What else can undermine your trading efforts? Read the full article to know.
block_05: New day — new indicator. Relative Strength Index is a momentum oscillator used to determine overbought/oversold levels. Learn how to set it up and use in trading.
block_08: John Murphy is a renowned technical analyst, an author and a man who knows a lot about trading. In this article you will find 5 laws of technical analysis that he uses daily.
